query: What Con Edison commercial customer service class pays the highest demand charge in Manhattan based on OpenEI tariffs data?
final_answer:
Using a Manhattan proxy address — **350 5th Ave, New York, NY 10118** — and **active, approved OpenEI IURDB commercial tariffs** for **Consolidated Edison Co-NY Inc. / EIA ID 4226**, the highest demand-charge service class is:

**SC-9 – General Large Voluntary TOD Service – Zone J [NYC]**

- **Maximum all-in demand-charge exposure:** **$76.38/kW-month**
- Components:
  - Flat demand component: **$26.20/kW**
  - Highest TOD demand component: **$40.17/kW**
  - Adjustment on that TOD demand component: **$10.01/kW**
  - Total: **$26.20 + $40.17 + $10.01 = $76.38/kW-month**

**Source:** OpenEI IURDB tariff lookup via `get_utility_tariffs`, Commercial sector, address `350 5th Ave, New York, NY 10118`, active approved tariffs; record name **“SC-9 - General Large Voluntary TOD Service - Zone J [NYC]”**, utility **Consolidated Edison Co-NY Inc**, EIA ID **4226**.

Note: If you compare only a single demand-tier line item without adding the flat demand component on TOD tariffs, the highest single line-item demand charge in the Manhattan/NYC Zone J records is **SC-8 – Multiple Dwellings Redistribution Low Tension Service – Zone J [NYC]** at **$68.54/kW** — base **$53.85/kW** plus **$14.69/kW** adjustment. Source: same OpenEI IURDB lookup.

steps.content:
Using a Manhattan proxy address — **350 5th Ave, New York, NY 10118** — and **active, approved OpenEI IURDB commercial tariffs** for **Consolidated Edison Co-NY Inc. / EIA ID 4226**, the highest demand-charge service class is:

**SC-9 – General Large Voluntary TOD Service – Zone J [NYC]**

- **Maximum all-in demand-charge exposure:** **$76.38/kW-month**
- Components:
  - Flat demand component: **$26.20/kW**
  - Highest TOD demand component: **$40.17/kW**
  - Adjustment on that TOD demand component: **$10.01/kW**
  - Total: **$26.20 + $40.17 + $10.01 = $76.38/kW-month**

**Source:** OpenEI IURDB tariff lookup via `get_utility_tariffs`, Commercial sector, address `350 5th Ave, New York, NY 10118`, active approved tariffs; record name **“SC-9 - General Large Voluntary TOD Service - Zone J [NYC]”**, utility **Consolidated Edison Co-NY Inc**, EIA ID **4226**.

Note: If you compare only a single demand-tier line item without adding the flat demand component on TOD tariffs, the highest single line-item demand charge in the Manhattan/NYC Zone J records is **SC-8 – Multiple Dwellings Redistribution Low Tension Service – Zone J [NYC]** at **$68.54/kW** — base **$53.85/kW** plus **$14.69/kW** adjustment. Source: same OpenEI IURDB lookup.
